description:
This quiz assesses proficiency in Node.js I/O operations, covering foundational file system tasks alongside advanced streaming and buffer management. Presented in an encouraging and informal tone, it targets intermediate developers by blending basic concepts with challenging best-practice scenarios. The assessment is designed to reinforce efficient data handling skills for backend JavaScript engineers.
Topics: Node.js I/O Operations, File System Handling, Buffers, Data Encoding, Streaming, Performance Best Practices
Audience: Intermediate JavaScript and Node.js developers
